description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a mesh upper in dark blue with prominent green and orange synthetic overlays forming structural and decorative patterns. The shoe has a thick, multi-layered sole with a white and green color scheme, and a visible tread designed for traction. The lacing system is standard, with dark laces threaded through reinforced eyelets, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The side of the shoe displays a distinctive logo in orange and white, integrated into the overlay design. The heel and toe areas show some signs of wear, with minor creasing and scuffing, but the overall structure remains intact.
description: A dark blue athletic running shoe with green and orange overlays, a thick white-green sole, and a visible side logo. The shoe features a mesh upper, padded collar, and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the mesh toe box, green overlays, and the prominent orange and white side logo.
description_view_1: Rear-side angle highlighting the padded heel collar, green heel overlay, and the continuation of the side logo.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the heel structure, green and black overlays, and the curvature of the sole.
description_view_3: Opposite front-side view showing the mesh upper, lacing, and the side logo from a different angle.
attribute_logo: Orange and white ASICS logo on the side panels
